hooks.command: printf '%s\n' 'Apply $groundcraft to substantial work with evidence and proportional validation; resolve product ambiguity first and do not announce the method. Use $groundcraft-handoff only for unfinished cross-session work or when requested, never per task. Stay direct for tiny known-path work, casual chat, simple translation or formatting, stable facts, or free ideation without describing a sequence of steps.'
hooks.commandWindows: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Write-Output 'Apply $groundcraft to substantial work with evidence and proportional validation; resolve product ambiguity first and do not announce the method. Use $groundcraft-handoff only for unfinished cross-session work or when requested, never per task. Stay direct for tiny known-path work, casual chat, simple translation or formatting, stable facts, or free ideation without describing a sequence of steps.'"

hooks.command: printf '%s\n' 'Apply $groundcraft to substantial delegated work. Stay within scope, keep domain skills in charge of their procedures, and return evidence rather than confidence.'
hooks.commandWindows: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Write-Output 'Apply $groundcraft to substantial delegated work. Stay within scope, keep domain skills in charge of their procedures, and return evidence rather than confidence.'"
